title: State predicates in validation rule selectors
description:
Extend rule `when` selectors so rules can match on issue state, enabling lifecycle-phase scoping of validation rules.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] `when` accepts a state predicate (single state or list) combinable with the existing type and label selectors
- [ ] Rules with a state predicate are evaluated only for issues in a matching state, on both the write path and `jit validate`
- [ ] Unknown state names in `when` are rejected at config load with an error naming the rule and the valid states
- [ ] `jit validate <id> --explain` shows whether the state predicate matched
- [ ] The validation-rules how-to and configuration reference document state predicates
